feedback.title: Provide feedback
feedback.rating_placeholder: Tell us more about your experience...
feedback.attach_files_feature: Optional: add a screenshot, sketch, or example.
feedback.consent: I consent to the Argus team processing this feedback and contacting me for follow-up details if necessary.
feedback.consent_feature: I consent to the Argus team using this feature request and contacting me if follow-up would help.

subheading.positive: What worked well in this response?
subheading.negative: What should be improved in this response?
subheading.general: Share feedback about your Argus experience.

feedback.error: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.
feedback.footer_note: App context like this page and timestamp may be included to help us understand this feedback.
feedback.footer_note_conversation: Your current conversation context may be included to help us understand this feedback.

chat.welcome: Welcome to Argus. Tell me an investing idea in plain language and I will help test it with Alpha-safe assumptions.
chat.text_only_input: Argus can only accept text here right now.
chat.disclaimer: Argus can make mistakes. For education only. Not financial advice.
chat.trigger_create_strategy: I want to create a new strategy.
chat.trigger_create_collection: I want to create a new collection.
placeholder_prompts: How has Apple performed against SPY this year so far?
What if I bought Bitcoin this year so far?
Explain a market term in simple words.
What happens if I hold Nvidia over the last 12 months?
Compare Ethereum and Bitcoin over the last 12 months.
Test buying SPY this year so far.
How does buying strong stocks work?
What if I bought $250 of Nvidia every week over the last 12 months?
Try a simple Solana buy-and-hold idea over the last 6 months.
Why do people compare a stock to SPY?

tsla.label: Test Apple vs SPY
tsla.value: Buy and hold AAPL over the last 12 months with SPY as the benchmark.

btc.label: Test Bitcoin (BTC) hold
btc.value: What if I bought Bitcoin this year so far?

dca.label: Test weekly Nvidia buys
dca.value: What if I bought $250 of Nvidia every week over the last 12 months?

example_queries.q1: What if I bought Apple after big drops?
example_queries.q2: What if I bought Bitcoin when it starts rising?
example_queries.q3: What if I bought Tesla every month?

chat.rate_limit_error: You've reached your request limit. Please wait a moment and try again.
chat.error_offline: Argus could not reach the API yet. Start the FastAPI service, then send your idea again.
chat.error_load: Could not load that conversation. Try again.
chat.error_backtest: I couldn't finish that turn. Try once more, or start a fresh chat if this conversation was restored from an older local session.
chat.result_trust_strip: Historical simulation · No fees/slippage · Not advice
chat.new_chat_ready: New chat ready. What idea should we test?
chat.resume_prompt: Resuming "{{title}}". What would you like to explore next?
chat.empty_history: Your past chats will appear here.
chat.no_recent_activity: No recent activity yet. Your strategies and chats will appear here.
chat.rename_failed: Could not rename this chat. Try again.

backtest_job.queued_body: Argus has the request and will start shortly.
backtest_job.queued_detail: You can leave this chat and come back; progress is saved.
backtest_job.running_body: Argus is calculating the result in the background.
backtest_job.running_detail: You can leave this chat and come back; progress is saved.
backtest_job.succeeded_body: The result is ready. Argus is loading the saved card.
backtest_job.succeeded_detail: The completed result will replace this progress card.
backtest_job.failed_body: The run stopped before Argus could save a result. Adjust the idea if needed and try again.
backtest_job.failed_retryable_body: The run stopped before Argus could save a result. You can retry this idea from the latest confirmation.
backtest_job.failed_detail: The conversation is saved, and this status will stay here.
backtest_job.expired_body: This run did not complete. Start a fresh backtest when you are ready.
backtest_job.expired_detail: Argus will not keep showing a running state for this job.

discovery.loading: Checking symbols, company names, crypto, currency pairs, and indicators.
discovery.empty: Type after @ to search supported assets and indicators.
discovery.no_results: No supported asset or indicator matched "{{query}}". Try a ticker or official company name.
discovery.unavailable_title: Discovery is taking longer than expected
discovery.unavailable: Try the ticker directly, or keep typing. Argus can still reason about your message.

strategies.empty_state: Strategies you save from chat will appear here.
strategies.error_load: Could not load strategies. Make sure the API is running.
strategies.unexecuted_hint: Run this strategy to see performance
strategies.run_hint: Run this strategy to see how {{symbols}} would have performed.

suggestions.title: RSI Threshold
suggestions.desc: Buy or sell when RSI reaches chosen levels.
suggestions.prompt: Design a strategy that buys the dip whenever the RSI falls below 30 and sells when it hits 70 for BTC.

suggestions.title: 10% Stop-Loss
suggestions.desc: Protect your capital with an automated exit rule.
suggestions.prompt: I want a strategy that buys any stock in my list and automatically sells if the price drops 10% from my entry.

suggestions.title: Trend Follower
suggestions.desc: Ride the momentum while the price is above the 50-day MA.
suggestions.prompt: Create a strategy that buys whenever the price is above the 50-day moving average on QQQ.

suggestions.title: Monthly DCA
suggestions.desc: Build positions steadily with fixed recurring buys.
suggestions.prompt: Create a simple monthly DCA strategy that buys SPY on the first trading day of each month.

collections.empty_state: Add strategy to collection or save from chat to see them here.
collections.error_load: Could not load collections. Make sure the API is running.

suggestions.title: Tech Giants
suggestions.desc: Group FAANG or top semiconductor companies in one place.
suggestions.prompt: I want to create a collection of the top 5 tech giants like AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA.

suggestions.title: Energy Transition
suggestions.desc: Climate-focused ideas and clean energy plays.
suggestions.prompt: I want to start a collection for energy transition and solar power ideas.

suggestions.title: Dividend Kings
suggestions.desc: Safe, consistent yield plays for a defensive portfolio.
suggestions.prompt: How should I structure a collection for long-term dividend growth stocks?

suggestions.title: Crypto HODL
suggestions.desc: Store your Bitcoin and Ethereum dip-buying logic.
suggestions.prompt: Create a collection for my long-term crypto accumulation strategies.

profile.delete_account_note: Request permanent deletion of your Argus account. Support will follow up by email.
profile.display_name_save_error: Could not save that name yet.
profile.title: Profile

request_deletion.title: Request account deletion
request_deletion.body: Support handles account deletion during private alpha. We'll verify ownership, process your account data, and follow up by email. Completed deletions cannot be undone.
request_deletion.success: Request sent. We'll follow up by email.
request_deletion.error: We could not submit that request yet.
request_deletion.email_body: Please help me request deletion for my Argus account{{account_hint}}.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.upgrade_pro: Try upgrading to Pro for Free

data.title: Data & Information
data.deleted_retention_note: Items stay here temporarily before permanent deletion.

delete_all_confirm.title: Delete all conversations?
delete_all_confirm.description: This moves all active and archived conversations to Recently Deleted. You can restore them before permanent removal.

delete_confirm.title: Delete this conversation?
delete_confirm.description: This moves “{{title}}” to Recently Deleted. You can restore it before permanent removal.

command_palette.preview_empty: Open this conversation to view its messages.
command_palette.select_preview: Select a conversation to preview its metadata.

onboarding.prompt: What is your current primary goal? Don't worry, you can change it later.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: Argus speaks multiple languages. Which one do you prefer?
language.description: This helps us personalize your experience.

onboarding.goal_description: We'll tailor your strategy insights based on this.

error.title: API Unreachable

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
